title: Road Builder Mod
description: A simple mod for building realistic roads. Initially, just adds the ability to draw road markings.
body:
### _Combatability_

Requires [Fabric api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and the [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/)

# **Preface**

Currently, this mod adds 2 new features; a white road marking block and a yellow road marking block. This means that it is **very** much in alpha progress.

![An example of what you can create with this mod. (just the road markings come with the mod so far)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec5c064c7df2436c71c0a275e9926f43fa0c7eff.png)

# **Purpose**

This mod allows a decent recreation of the world's roads in a seemless manner without having to use debugged or obscure vanilla blocks to create the look of a road.

![Road made with new blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/069d4046b40bf1dda0a2c58e6d36384684cffadb.png)

# **Features**

Only accessible by the creative inventory, scroll down to the bottom of the **building blocks** section and you will find two _spray can_ sprites - they are respectively yellow and white. Drag them to your hotbar, exit the creative menu, and then 'spray' these blocks. You might notice that they are **complete clones of the redstone dust block** as they conduct redstone power.

![White Road Marking Sprite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe45f5f2a51921df9ddfc0639f4c41ba33fabd8b.png)
![Yellow Road Marking Sprite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25d750b6c1dad768a542ec76d6bbca677e9b9176.png)
# **Future**

In future the team plans to add a built in road creating mechanism such as ones from the cities skylines 2 game
Eg:

![Cities: Skylines 2 with road creating example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aea813eb8751cfad47b2fe74dc55800f27985a51.jpeg)

And a sort of node system for snapping to existing roads to make a user friendly experience.
